description: Schema for betting-auditor daily cloud research reports

date.description: UTC date of this audit run (YYYY-MM-DD)

snapshot_date.description: Date of the Pi data analysed — one day prior to the snapshot push (YYYY-MM-DD)

logs_analysed.description: List of routine log filenames that were available and read

pipeline_health.description: Summary of the day's pipeline status across all runs

findings.description: List of findings. May be empty if nothing material found.

id.description: Sequential ID within this report (F001, F002, ...)

evidence.description: What the snapshot data shows — quote specific numbers

external_context.description: What external research found to explain or contextualise the evidence

confidence.description: high=well-supported by data+research, medium=plausible, speculative=low-n or weak evidence

suggested_action.description: Optional: a concrete action for the Pi's model audit to consider

no_findings_reason.description: Explanation if findings is empty. Null if findings were found.
